name: Power Tool Mecha Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>械</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> パワー・ツール
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
During your turn, when an Equip Spell(s) becomes equipped to this card: You can draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Power Tool Mecha Dragon" once per turn. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 appropriate face-up Equip Card on the field; equip that target to this card.
